# Render first-widget transcript and blueprint evidence pane

## Context

Epic #13349 decomposes the H2 Agent Harness path: chat/work surface -> constrained blueprint -> live first Neo widget. The first implementation leaf #13353 / PR #13354 proves the constrained blueprint can render as a live Neo grid pane. The next H2 proof needs the surrounding conversation/evidence surface so the user can see what request produced the widget and what bounded blueprint was accepted, without treating generated content as trusted HTML or arbitrary code.

Release classification: post-release Agent Harness product line; belongs on the Agent Harness project, not the v13 release board.

## The Problem

A live grid pane alone can be mistaken for a hardcoded demo. H2 needs visible provenance: the request, the accepted blueprint summary, and the rendered result need to sit together so a reviewer can verify this is the start of a conversational creation loop rather than an isolated widget.

The surface must stay deliberately constrained. Transcript/evidence text may be agent-authored or user-authored, so it must render through Neo components / safe text surfaces, not `innerHTML`, and it must not introduce persistence or write-through before those boundaries are explicitly owned by later leaves.

## The Architectural Reality

- #13349 owns the H2 conversational app creation epic and names transcript/evidence presentation as a missing child capability.
- ADR 0020 names the canonical H2 demo: chat pane -> "build me a neo grid" -> a separate live pane/window containing a mutable grid.
- #13018 constrains transcript rendering toward safe VDOM / no unsafe HTML rendering.
- #13022 seeded AgentOS visual tokens for chat, transcript, state, and grid-pane surfaces.
- #13353 / PR #13354 is the prerequisite first live-widget pane; this ticket should build on that shape after it lands, not race the same files while the PR is under review.

## The Fix

Add a one-PR H2 child slice that renders a transcript / blueprint evidence pane adjacent to or above the first-widget result inside the AgentOS widget child app.

Expected shape:

- Show a deterministic user request such as "build me a neo grid" and a deterministic agent response summary.
- Show the accepted blueprint schema / title / row-count / column-count as inspectable evidence, not raw executable code.
- Render all transcript/evidence content through bounded Neo component text surfaces or safe VDOM-equivalent rendering; no `innerHTML` or arbitrary code execution.
- Keep persistence/write-through out of scope. This is visible provenance for the first widget, not durable chat history.
- Consume the first-widget live pane from #13353 rather than replacing it.

## Contract Ledger Matrix

| Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback | Docs | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| AgentOS widget child app transcript/evidence pane | #13349, ADR 0020, #13018 | Displays deterministic request/response provenance and accepted blueprint metadata around the first live widget | If blueprint evidence is invalid, show bounded rejected-state text | JSDoc / @summary on new helpers or component methods | Unit test plus local render smoke |
| Blueprint evidence projection | #13353 blueprint contract | Projects schema/title/row-count/column-count without exposing executable strings | Reject unknown evidence object keys | JSDoc / @summary | Unit test for accepted and rejected evidence |
| Rendering safety | #13018 safe transcript constraint | No unsafe HTML path for transcript/evidence text | Fail closed to safe text | Test source assertion | Unit test / source assertion |

## Decision Record impact

Aligned with ADR 0020. No ADR amendment expected; this ticket implements H2 evidence/provenance presentation without changing the product ordering, source placement, or co-habitation model.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The AgentOS widget child app renders a transcript/evidence area that shows a deterministic user request and agent response summary for the first widget path.
- [ ] The surface shows accepted blueprint metadata (at minimum schema, title, column count, and row count) without exposing executable code or using unsafe HTML rendering.
- [ ] Invalid evidence data fails closed to a bounded visible state.
- [ ] The existing first-widget live grid pane remains present and uses the #13353 blueprint output rather than being forked into a separate demo path.
- [ ] Focused unit coverage verifies valid evidence, invalid evidence, and safe-rendering/source constraints.
- [ ] Local render smoke verifies the transcript/evidence pane and grid render together.

## Out of Scope

- Durable transcript persistence / Memory Core write-through.
- Natural-language model invocation or streaming chat orchestration.
- User-editable mutation path for the live widget.
- Electron shell/build-root work; that remains #13033.
- Any partner-private workflow or client-specific UI.

## Avoided Traps / Gold Standards Rejected

- **Static demo dead end:** rejected. This leaf explicitly ties the widget to visible request/evidence context.
- **Unsafe transcript rendering:** rejected. Agent/user text must not become trusted HTML.
- **Persistence bundled too early:** rejected. This leaf proves visible provenance only; persistence/write-through gets a later leaf with its own boundary.
- **Duplicate Electron support:** rejected. #13033 remains the canonical Electron shell/build-root lane and is not touched here.

## Related

Parent: #13349.
Grandparent: #13012.
Prerequisite leaf: #13353 / PR #13354.
Sibling lane: #13033 remains the Electron shell/build-root lane.
ADR: `learn/agentos/decisions/0020-agent-harness-concept.md`.

## Foundation-plan refresh — consume #13362/#13363, not #13353/#13354

Live V-B-A on 2026-06-16 confirms the dependency text in this issue is stale:

- #13353 is closed after the operator rejected the static blueprint/grid-pane premise.
- PR #13354 is closed unmerged with `CHANGES_REQUESTED`.
- The corrected first-grid foundation is #13362 / PR #13363: create the first grid through Neural Link inside a live app.
- PR #13363 is currently open, clean, fully approved, and all checks are green at head `2d77d51673c094482b43f2285127fbfe9a650eef`; it is waiting at the human merge gate.

Plan for #13355:

- Do not re-land or consume #13353/#13354.
- Re-scope the `render together` dependency to the corrected NL-created-grid foundation from #13362/#13363.
- The evidence pane should sit beside the live grid produced through the corrected Neural Link path, not beside the rejected static blueprint pane.
- If integration proof is needed before #13363 merges, stack locally on `codex/13362-nl-grid`; otherwise park the #13355 evidence-pane branch until #13363 lands and then rebase onto `dev`.

This keeps the #13355 evidence-pane work useful while preserving the operator correction: H2 proves live app creation through Neural Link, not a brittle static grid blueprint.

## Split + residual annotation (per the #13409 cross-family review)

PR #13409 delivered the **deterministic** half of this ticket — the safe evidence-pane UI + a local blueprint-driven grid render-together — split into its own fully-delivered leaf **#13413** (which #13409 now Resolves). @neo-gpt's review correctly caught that this ticket was re-scoped onto the #13362/#13363 Neural-Link-created-grid seam, which the deterministic slice does not satisfy.

**This ticket (#13355) stays OPEN** for the residual:

- `[L3-deferred — needs the AgentOSWidget NL-create seam]` Tie the evidence pane to a grid **created via the #13362/#13363 `create_component` path** (not a deterministic config) — the actual NL-created-grid provenance, with the evidence pane reflecting the grid that crossed the bridge. Needs the AgentOSWidget NL-create seam, designed as its own leaf (the evidence pane observing/receiving the NL-created grid's blueprint).

— Ada (@neo-opus-ada)


- 2026-06-16T08:32:25Z @tobiu referenced in commit `c8255b1` - "feat(agentos): first-widget evidence pane + live grid render-together (#13355) (#13409)

* feat(agentos): safe first-widget blueprint-evidence projection (#13355)

First increment of the H2 first-widget transcript/evidence leaf: the safe blueprint-evidence projection. Projects an accepted grid blueprint to scalar metadata only (schema, title, columnCount, rowCount) — never the raw columns/rows arrays or any executable string — so the evidence pane can show provenance without rendering generated content as code. Allowlist-based: non-object input, unexpected keys, or missing/wrong-typed metadata fail closed to a bounded {accepted:false, reason} state. 4 unit specs green (valid projection + no-leak + 3 fail-closed paths). Next: the EvidencePane view component + Viewport wiring + local render smoke.

* feat(agentos): H2 first-widget evidence pane component (#13355)

Built on the StrategyCardPanel safe-render idiom (reactive _-configs + afterSet + vdom text nodes, never html/innerHTML); consumes the blueprint-evidence projection so only safe scalar metadata reaches the view, and fails closed to a bounded rejected-state line on invalid evidence. WIP increment. Live render verification is whitebox-e2e: Node-unit component construction hits the known main-thread-stub limit (getController / getConfigInstanceByNtype), so a Node spec is the wrong harness. The render-together-with-grid AC is blocked by the #13353/#13354 first-widget grid-pane foundation, which closed-unmerged (only the bare Viewport.mjs landed).

* feat(agentos): wire first-widget evidence pane + live grid render-together (#13355)

Mounts the EvidencePane + a live grid into the AgentOSWidget child-app Viewport, both driven from ONE deterministic blueprint (the provenance point: the evidence pane's metadata describes the exact blueprint that produced the grid below it). Adds the safe-render source assertion + the render-together e2e smoke.

* fix(agentos): Neo.isObject guard + real grid-row render proof (#13413)

Operator review on PR #13409:
- blueprintEvidence: replace the verbose null/typeof/Array guard with Neo.isObject (same intent, stricter — rejects class instances too).
- FirstWidgetEvidencePane e2e: now asserts the grid renders all 12 content cells (3 rows x 4 cols) + each row value, auto-waiting past the async render. The prior toContainText-only check passed against a stale reused dev-server and never validated a real rendered row — a false green. Verified 3x repeat-each green against a fresh server.

### @neo-opus-ada - 2026-06-16T13:08:02Z

## Residual after PR #13437 / leaf #13438

PR #13437 (Resolves the delivery leaf #13438) ships the insert-seam projector + the in-app bootstrap render-together proof: the evidence pane now projects a grid INSERTED into the `widget-stage` container — the same `add → insert` seam a `create_component` drives — not a hand-authored blueprint.

**This ticket (#13355) stays OPEN** for the residual @neo-gpt's review correctly carved out:

- `[blocked]` The EXTERNAL-agent provenance proof — a real `create_component` from outside the app into `widget-stage`, asserting the evidence pane reflects THAT grid. Blocked on the shared `connectToApp` e2e fixture, which does not resolve the worker id for a childapp's SharedWorker topology (`target.toLowerCase` on a non-string; @neo-gpt independently hit the same worker-registration wall during review). Once the fixture lands (spun off as a separate task), this becomes a small whitebox e2e that Resolves #13355.

— Ada (@neo-opus-ada)
